Home › Golden Visa Programs
Guide · Updated 2026-04-19

Golden visa programs: residence & citizenship by investment

Every major residence-by-investment (RBI) and citizenship-by-investment (CBI) program in one place. Sorted by minimum investment, with tax regime, physical-presence requirement, path-to-citizenship timeline, and a direct link to the official government programme page.

26programs listed
8direct-citizenship
18residence permits
20no-presence programs

Cheapest direct citizenship (CBI)

These programs give you a second passport — not just a residence permit — for a donation or investment. Caribbean CBIs are the most established; Turkey is the cheapest true major passport upgrade.

CountryInvestmentTypeProcessingTax regime
Vanuatu $130k Donation to national fund 1-2 months 0% income tax, 0% capital gains, 0% inheritance
Dominica $200k Donation (EDF) / Real estate $200k 3-5 months 0% personal income tax
Antigua & Barbuda $230k Donation (NDF) / Real estate $300k / University donation 4-6 months 0% personal income tax
Grenada $235k Donation (NTF) / Real estate $270k 3-4 months 0% on foreign income; citizens eligible for US E-2 investor visa
St Lucia $240k Donation (NEF) / Real estate $300k / Gov bonds 3-6 months 0% on foreign income

Fastest path to citizenship (RBI)

If you want an EU or similar passport via residency rather than direct CBI, these are the shortest paths. Physical-presence requirements vary — some ask for just 7 days/year (Portugal).

CountryInvestmentYears to citizenshipPhysical presence
Singapore $7.3M 2 years —
Canada No direct $ 3 years 730 days/year
Paraguay $70k 3 years —
Ecuador $50k 3 years 90 days/year
Portugal $545k 5 years 7 days/year

No physical presence required

These programs don\'t require you to actually live in the country — just a visit every year or two to keep the permit active. Good for second-home / "Plan B" holders.

Spain · $545kGreece · $273kMalta · $187kItaly · $273kHungary · $273kLatvia · $272kUnited Arab Emirates · $545kTürkiye · $400kJordan · $750kSt Kitts & Nevis · $250kDominica · $200kAntigua & Barbuda · $230kGrenada · $235kSt Lucia · $240kThailand · $18kIndonesia · $130kSingapore · $7.3MPanama · $200kParaguay · $70kVanuatu · $130k

All 26 programs (sorted by minimum investment)

Low → high. Click any country name to jump to details.

Canada · Start-up Visa

RBI family
Min investment
No direct $
Investment type
Business (venture-backed or angel/incubator-supported)
Duration
5 years
Path to citizenship
3 years
Physical presence
730 days/yr
Processing
24-36 months

Tax regime: Worldwide income taxed as PR

Not a classic golden visa — requires a viable startup + support letter from a designated VC/angel/incubator. Canada's Quebec Investor closed 2019. This is the closest substitute.

Official programme page ↗

Thailand · Thailand Privilege Visa (formerly Elite)

RBI family renewable no-presence
Min investment
$18k
Investment type
Membership fee (paid to government)
Duration
5 years
Path to citizenship
N/A
Physical presence
None
Processing
1-3 months

Tax regime: Territorial — foreign income exempt if not remitted same year

Not a real investment program — it's a paid membership for a long-stay visa. Tiers: Gold 5yr $18k, Platinum 10yr $29k, Diamond 15yr $74k, Reserve 20yr $145k. No property purchase needed.

Official programme page ↗

Ecuador · Investor Visa

RBI family renewable
Min investment
$50k
Investment type
Real estate / Business / Bank CD
Duration
2 years
Path to citizenship
3 years
Physical presence
90 days/yr
Processing
2-3 months

Tax regime: Worldwide income taxed; foreign retirees often qualify for retiree visa tax breaks

Lowest investment threshold in Latin America at 40x monthly minimum wage (~$18k-50k depending on year). Popular with US retirees.

Official programme page ↗

Paraguay · Investor / Rentista Residency

RBI family no-presence
Min investment
$70k
Investment type
Bank deposit / Business
Duration
Permanent
Path to citizenship
3 years
Physical presence
None
Processing
2-4 months

Tax regime: Territorial — 0% on foreign income

One of the cheapest RBIs in the Americas. $70k bank deposit or business investment. Leads to permanent residency and citizenship in 3 years.

Official programme page ↗

Indonesia · Second Home Visa

RBI family renewable no-presence
Min investment
$130k
Investment type
Bank deposit / Real estate of equal value
Duration
10 years
Path to citizenship
N/A
Physical presence
None
Processing
2-4 months

Tax regime: Territorial if structured; local real-estate ownership has restrictions

Ten-year visa with a $130k parked in Indonesian bank OR equivalent property. 5-year or 10-year variants.

Official programme page ↗

Vanuatu · Development Support Programme (CBI)

CBI family no-presence
Min investment
$130k
Investment type
Donation to national fund
Duration
Permanent
Path to citizenship
Immediate
Physical presence
None
Processing
1-2 months

Tax regime: 0% income tax, 0% capital gains, 0% inheritance

Fastest CBI globally (1-2 months). Visa-free list reduced significantly in 2023 (EU/UK now require visas) — verify current before buying.

Official programme page ↗

Malaysia · Malaysia My Second Home (MM2H)

RBI family renewable
Min investment
$170k
Investment type
Bank deposit + monthly income proof
Duration
5 years
Path to citizenship
N/A
Physical presence
90 days/yr
Processing
6-9 months

Tax regime: Territorial — no tax on foreign-source income

Rebooted 2024 with three tiers: Silver (5yr, MYR 750k), Gold (15yr, MYR 2M), Platinum (20yr, MYR 5M). Presence: 90 days/year. Child under 34 and parents qualify as dependants.

Official programme page ↗

Malta · Permanent Residence Programme (MPRP)

RBI family no-presence
Min investment
$187k
Investment type
Donation + Real estate (rent or buy) + Fee
Duration
Permanent
Path to citizenship
N/A
Physical presence
None
Processing
6-12 months

Tax regime: Non-dom: territorial taxation — foreign income only taxed if remitted

Permanent residence from day 1 (no renewals). Total cost with property, donation, admin ~€300-350k. Separate CBI programme (Malta CES) exists but is €700k+ and politically contested.

Official programme page ↗

Dominica · Citizenship by Investment

CBI family no-presence
Min investment
$200k
Investment type
Donation (EDF) / Real estate $200k
Duration
Permanent
Path to citizenship
Immediate
Physical presence
None
Processing
3-5 months

Tax regime: 0% personal income tax

Cheapest CBI in the Caribbean. $200k single-applicant donation; family of 4 from $230k+fees. Passport gives ~140-country visa-free access.

Official programme page ↗

Panama · Friendly Nations Visa + Qualified Investor

RBI family no-presence
Min investment
$200k
Investment type
Real estate / Bank deposit / Securities
Duration
Permanent
Path to citizenship
5 years
Physical presence
None
Processing
3-6 months

Tax regime: Territorial — 0% on foreign income

Fast track to PR. Available to ~50 "friendly nation" passports. $200k real-estate investment or $750k bonds. No physical-presence requirement for PR renewal.

Official programme page ↗

Antigua & Barbuda · Citizenship by Investment

CBI family no-presence
Min investment
$230k
Investment type
Donation (NDF) / Real estate $300k / University donation
Duration
Permanent
Path to citizenship
Immediate
Physical presence
None
Processing
4-6 months

Tax regime: 0% personal income tax

Must spend 5 days on-island within first 5 years. Family of up to 4 for $230k NDF donation. Passport visa-free to ~150 countries.

Official programme page ↗

Grenada · Citizenship by Investment

CBI family no-presence
Min investment
$235k
Investment type
Donation (NTF) / Real estate $270k
Duration
Permanent
Path to citizenship
Immediate
Physical presence
None
Processing
3-4 months

Tax regime: 0% on foreign income; citizens eligible for US E-2 investor visa

Unique: Grenadian citizens qualify for the US E-2 treaty-investor visa. Passport gives ~144-country visa-free + China visa-free.

Official programme page ↗

St Lucia · Citizenship by Investment

CBI family no-presence
Min investment
$240k
Investment type
Donation (NEF) / Real estate $300k / Gov bonds
Duration
Permanent
Path to citizenship
Immediate
Physical presence
None
Processing
3-6 months

Tax regime: 0% on foreign income

Newest of the 5 Caribbean CBIs (launched 2016). No physical-presence requirement. Passport gives ~146-country visa-free access.

Official programme page ↗

St Kitts & Nevis · Citizenship by Investment

CBI family no-presence
Min investment
$250k
Investment type
Donation (Sustainable Island State Contribution) / Real estate $400k
Duration
Permanent
Path to citizenship
Immediate
Physical presence
None
Processing
3-6 months

Tax regime: 0% personal income tax; no worldwide taxation

World's oldest CBI (1984). Single applicant $250k donation. Passport gives visa-free access to ~155 countries including Schengen, UK, HK, Singapore. Must visit once in first 5 years.

Official programme page ↗

Latvia · Temporary Residence by Investment

RBI family renewable no-presence
Min investment
$272k
Investment type
Real estate / Company capital / Bank subordinated deposit
Duration
5 years
Path to citizenship
10 years
Physical presence
None
Processing
1-3 months

Tax regime: Flat 20-31% income tax; non-residents taxed on Latvia-source only

One of the cheapest Schengen residences. Property value: €250k outside Riga, €250k in Riga was raised. 5-year permit, EU citizenship possible after 10.

Official programme page ↗

Greece · Golden Visa

RBI family renewable no-presence
Min investment
$273k
Investment type
Real estate
Duration
5 years
Path to citizenship
7 years
Physical presence
None
Processing
2-6 months

Tax regime: Foreign retirees pay flat 7% on pensions; non-dom regime available

Tiered thresholds: €250k-€800k depending on region (Athens/Santorini/Mykonos now €800k; rest €400k; specific low-density areas €250k). No physical-presence requirement — popular "Plan B" EU residence.

Official programme page ↗

Italy · Investor Visa (Visto Investitori)

RBI family renewable no-presence
Min investment
$273k
Investment type
Startup investment / Gov bonds / Philanthropy
Duration
2 years
Path to citizenship
10 years
Physical presence
None
Processing
1-3 months

Tax regime: €200k/yr flat-tax regime for foreign income (up to 15 years)

Cheapest option is €250k in an Italian innovative startup. €500k in a limited company, €1M philanthropy, €2M gov bonds. The €200k/yr flat-tax regime is the main attractor for high-earners.

Official programme page ↗

Hungary · Guest Investor Visa

RBI family renewable no-presence
Min investment
$273k
Investment type
Fund investment / Real estate / Donation
Duration
10 years
Path to citizenship
8 years
Physical presence
None
Processing
3-6 months

Tax regime: Standard Hungarian rates (15% personal income tax — lowest in EU)

Relaunched 2024 with 10-year permit (longest in EU). €250k fund route is unusual; €500k real estate more common. Path to EU citizenship after 8 years.

Official programme page ↗

Cyprus · Permanent Residence (Fast-Track)

RBI family
Min investment
$327k
Investment type
Real estate (new-build only)
Duration
Permanent
Path to citizenship
7 years
Physical presence
60 days/yr
Processing
2-3 months

Tax regime: Non-dom: 0% on dividends/interest for 17 years; 50% exemption on income >€55k

Visit requirement: 1 visit every 2 years + 60 days/year for citizenship track. Cyprus CBI (passport directly) was suspended in 2020.

Official programme page ↗

Türkiye · Citizenship by Investment

CBI family no-presence
Min investment
$400k
Investment type
Real estate / Bank deposit / Gov bonds / Capital investment
Duration
Permanent
Path to citizenship
Immediate
Physical presence
None
Processing
4-6 months

Tax regime: Worldwide income taxed if resident; non-residents on Turkish-source only

Immediate passport. Cheapest CBI granting access to ~115 countries visa-free. $400k real-estate threshold (raised from $250k in 2022). Hold 3 years minimum.

Official programme page ↗

Portugal · Golden Visa (ARI) — Investment Fund or Cultural / Business

RBI family renewable
Min investment
$545k
Investment type
Investment fund / Cultural donation / Job creation
Duration
2 years
Path to citizenship
5 years
Physical presence
7 days/yr
Processing
6-12 months

Tax regime: NHR closed to new applicants in 2024; standard Portuguese rates now apply

Real-estate option closed October 2023. Still one of the fastest paths to EU passport (5 years, 7 days/year presence). Investment-fund route is the most popular remaining track.

Official programme page ↗

Spain · Investor Visa (closing April 2025)

RBI family renewable no-presence
Min investment
$545k
Investment type
Real estate / Bonds / Company shares / Bank deposit
Duration
3 years
Path to citizenship
10 years
Physical presence
None
Processing
2-4 months

Tax regime: Beckham Law: 24% flat tax for 6 years on Spanish-source income if structured correctly

Spain announced program closure April 2025; existing permits honoured. Popular with non-EU buyers until then. Very light physical-presence requirement.

Official programme page ↗

United Arab Emirates · Golden Visa (10-year)

RBI family renewable no-presence
Min investment
$545k
Investment type
Real estate / Business / Public investment fund
Duration
10 years
Path to citizenship
N/A
Physical presence
None
Processing
1-3 months

Tax regime: 0% personal income tax; UAE residence unlocks bonus travel (see our guide)

Direct 10-year renewable residence. No path to citizenship (UAE citizenship only by discretion). Dubai/Abu Dhabi real-estate track is the most common. Entrepreneurs: AED 500k business capital also qualifies.

Official programme page ↗

Jordan · Investment Citizenship

CBI family no-presence
Min investment
$750k
Investment type
Treasury bonds / Bank deposit / SME investment
Duration
Permanent
Path to citizenship
Immediate
Physical presence
None
Processing
6-9 months

Tax regime: Territorial — foreign income exempt

Less well-known CBI. $750k treasury bonds for 3-6 years, or $1M SME investment. Jordanian passport has modest visa-free list but unique regional access.

Official programme page ↗

United States · EB-5 Investor Visa

RBI family renewable
Min investment
$800k
Investment type
Business / Regional-center project
Duration
2 years
Path to citizenship
5 years
Physical presence
180 days/yr
Processing
24-60 months

Tax regime: Worldwide income taxed once you become resident

Leads directly to US Green Card (I-526E approval). Must create/preserve 10 US jobs. Targeted Employment Area route: $800k; regular: $1.05M. Slow: 2-5+ years.

Official programme page ↗

Singapore · Global Investor Programme (GIP)

RBI family renewable no-presence
Min investment
$7.3M
Investment type
Business / Single Family Office / PE fund
Duration
5 years
Path to citizenship
2 years
Physical presence
None
Processing
9-12 months

Tax regime: Territorial — foreign income untaxed; 0% capital gains

High bar ($7.3M+). Gives direct Permanent Resident status (skip the usual hoops). Good for family offices; limited to 40-70 approvals/year.

Official programme page ↗

Frequently asked questions

What's the difference between RBI and CBI?
Residence-by-Investment (RBI) gives you a residence permit in exchange for investment — you can live there, but you stay a citizen of your home country. After a few years of residency you can usually apply for citizenship normally. Citizenship-by-Investment (CBI) grants you the passport directly, typically within 3-9 months.
Which is the cheapest golden visa?
By headline minimum investment: Canada (Start-up Visa) at No direct $. Among residence-by-investment programs with a real property / asset track, Thailand and Paraguay ($70k) are the cheapest.
Which is the cheapest citizenship-by-investment?
Among Caribbean CBIs, Dominica is consistently the cheapest at $200k donation for a single applicant. Vanuatu and Dominica are close behind. For passport strength though, St Kitts and Grenada (E-2 treaty) outperform Dominica.
Which golden visa has the fastest path to an EU passport?
Portugal remains the leader at 5 years + 7 days/year physical presence. Greece (7 years) and Cyprus (7 years) are next. Malta's MPRP gives permanent residency immediately but no citizenship path. Turkey (4-6 months to full passport) is faster but not EU.
Do I have to physically live there?
20 of 26 programs have no physical-presence requirement — you just need to make the investment and visit occasionally. Others require as little as 7 days/year (Portugal), or as much as 183 days/year (US EB-5, Canada Start-up). Check the "Physical presence" column carefully.
Are Caribbean CBI passports still useful?
Yes, but visa-free lists have shrunk recently. Vanuatu lost Schengen visa-free access in 2023. St Kitts, Antigua, Dominica, Grenada, St Lucia still offer 140-155-country visa-free access including Schengen and UK. EU has signalled it may require visas from all Caribbean CBI holders by late 2026 — buy early if this matters.
Is Turkey's citizenship-by-investment still a good deal?
Turkey CBI at $400k real-estate is the best-value true citizenship (not just residency) on the market. Turkish passport gives visa-free access to ~115 countries including Japan, Singapore, Malaysia, most of Latin America — and Turkish citizens can apply for the US E-2 treaty-investor visa. Downside: Turkish real estate has underperformed USD-terms since 2018.
Which golden visa gives the best tax treatment?
UAE Golden Visa (0% personal income tax). St Kitts / Dominica / Vanuatu CBIs (0% worldwide). Italy Investor (€200k/yr flat-tax regime covers all foreign income). Cyprus Non-Dom (0% on dividends/interest for 17 years). Malaysia MM2H (territorial — foreign income exempt).
How current is this list?
Compiled from official programme pages in the links provided. Programs change frequently — Spain closed its investor visa (effective April 2025), Portugal removed the property track (October 2023), Hungary rebooted (2024). Always verify current rules on the government source page before paying any fees.
